name: MultiwayTreeUtil

values.name: flatten
values.comment: Flattens the tree resulting with list of all node values

values.name: forestLookup
values.comment: Lookup for specified node in a disjoint tree set

values.name: lca
values.comment: Finds the lowest common ancestor in a disjoint tree set
values.type: a -> a -> Forest a -> Maybe a

values.name: traverse
values.comment: Performs a traverse of zipper resulting with a list of node values

values.name: traverseFrom
values.comment: Performs a traverse of zipper starting from given node.
values.type: Maybe a -> Zipper a -> List a

values.name: treeLookup
values.comment: Lookup for specified node in a tree
